creator: rpotts@med.osd.mil
text:
Based on a random load of ports, the following "... is a required package 
but was not found" by the installation program:  pgp-2.6.2,rsaref-2.0,
ghostscript-4.03(also 5.10),transfig-3.2,freetype-1.0.

Are some of the links broken?

How-To-Repeat: Mark a large amount of packages for installation after the initial setup.
